body.u: At 15 I left school. I was pleased now, because I was rid of Lorna Smith the {rotteness?} division tutor at the school I had, had a job put by for me and as soon as I left school. The next day I was working for the council hard the job was putting new pathingpatching stones down.

Now and again breaking the old ones hard that was than going round collecting the refuse bag for 6 weeks. Then the carpenters and then the bricklayers and then the Royal Airforce drill that was horrible nether did like that.
